preamble.summary: Woe to the shepherds / the Righteous Branch / false prophets. LXX slightly shorter.
preamble.notable_variants: LXX is shorter in the false-prophets section (vv. 14-32). Some phrases in MT appear to be later expansions. The messianic 'Branch' passage (vv. 5-6) is present in both.

variant_notes: LXX and MT are substantially identical here.
